action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_overview
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the basic patient demographics including age, gender, and weight. Required for calculating dosages and transfusion volumes.

action_set_definitions.name: assess_vitals
action_set_definitions.description: Obtains current physiological parameters (Heart Rate, Blood Pressure, Respiratory Rate, Temperature, and Oxygen Saturation).

action_set_definitions.name: examine_patient
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a focused physical examination to identify airway patency, breathing effort, and neurological status (AVPU/GCS).

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_clinical_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves medical records, prior clinic visit details, allergies, and social history/location (to assess endemic risk).

action_set_definitions.name: order_lab_tests
action_set_definitions.description: Samples internal biochemical and hematological values from the environment.

action_set_definitions.name: monitor_response
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the internal treatment_response_buffer to track changes in the patient's state over time.

state_description.patient_demographics: Basic patient info including age, gender, and weight.
state_description.hidden_pathophysiology: The ground truth medical conditions and disease progression status not visible to the agent.
state_description.current_vitals: Current physiological parameters (HR, BP, RR, Temp, SpO2).
state_description.internal_lab_values: A comprehensive set of internal biochemical values that can be sampled by tests.
state_description.active_symptoms: List of current symptoms and their hidden intensities.
state_description.clinical_history: Past medical history, allergies, and social history.
state_description.treatment_response_buffer: Internal tracking of how the patient is responding to administered treatments over time.

hidden_pathophysiology.primary_condition: Severe Cerebral Malaria with Pfhrp2 Gene Deletion and Severe Acute Malnutrition (SAM)

past_illnesses: Clinician Note (4 hours ago): Patient screened at triage. MUAC 13.5cm (Green). Temperature 37.2. Malaria RDT: Negative. Impression: Mild viral syndrome. Discharged with paracetamol.
